Episode Summary The adventure ends 
If Anyone Makes It Back Alive... the debriefing takes place in the same 
room where the group was originally briefed. Al citizens and machine intelligences involv fed in the mission are present. Lucky is, available for questioning via radio link. The ‘same briefing officers are present at the bench = Peter and Ness-Y — but Dr. Num-O is replaced by another R&D representative. Meg: O-FUN-2 the PLC warehouse clerk and Samson-G-WIZ-4 the R&D supervisor are also. seated at the briefing bench, each clutching a thick sheaf of forms. And, of course, don’t forget The Computer The PCs stand in a line before the bench, Peter looks at his papers, then at the group.
